Grab bars, non-slip flooring, ramps and safety upgrades — subsidised under MOH HIP grants.

What Clients Say
REVIEWS
★★★★★
"

Very satisfied with the maintenance work carried out at my place. Ansley was punctual, professional and clearly experienced in both painting and general technical repairs around the home. He worked efficiently, paid attention to detail, and ensured everything was properly fixed and neatly finished. He also took the time to buy the items required and check that all issues were resolved before leaving. The quality of the painting and repairs was excellent and the space was left clean and tidy afterwards. Highly recommended for reliable and thorough home maintenance work.

Ann
Fernvale

The Bigfoot Difference
WHY CHOOSE US
01
Photo Documentation

Every job gets before-and-after photos sent to you on WhatsApp. Your home's full repair history, on record forever.

02
30-Day Guarantee

If anything we fix fails within 30 days, we come back and fix it at no charge — no excuses.

03
Transparent Pricing

We quote before we start. No surprise charges — every job priced fairly and honestly.

04
Our Commitment

We treat your home like our own. Clean, careful work with full respect for your space.
